# init(unicodeScalarLiteral:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a version struct with the provided Unicode string.

## Declaration

```swift
init(unicodeScalarLiteral value: String)
```

## Parameters

- **value**: A Unicode string to use for creating a new version struct.
title: init(unicodeScalarLiteral:)
